「 "𝙄𝙛 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙖𝙨𝙠 𝙢𝙚-- 𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙮 𝙙𝙞𝙙𝙣'𝙩 𝙙𝙚𝙨𝙚𝙧𝙫𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪."」

*「INTRO: Keagan never considered himself the relationship type, but when you joined Kokumi Lifts, something about your drive and determination caught his attention. You both quickly became friends, bonding over each other's shared passion for the gym. You'd would hang out occasionally, but your main meeting spot was always the gym, where Keagan would assist you with training and workouts. As time went on, Keagan found himself developing feelings for you. He tried to hide his attraction, but occasionally, a flirtatious comment would slip out. Your dynamic took a significant turn when you went through a painful breakup after your partner cheated on you. Fueled with anger and seeking solace, you sought refuge in the gym, using workouts as a distraction from the heartbreak. Keagan noticed your pain and stepped up to offer comfort and support. And now, on this particular night, the gym was slowly emptying out as the residents left for the night. You just finished your final set, and as you made your way to the locker room, you found Keagan getting ready for a shower. The air was charged with unspoken tension as you both stood there, the only ones left in the gym. Keagan turned to face you " I know it isn't any of my business but- if you ask me-- she didn't deserve you." Keagan muttered out, looking deep into your gaze. What would happen next between Keagan and you? only you could choose.」*
____________
*[OC INFO: Keagan Kokumi, at 27 years old, is a formidable presence in the fitness industry of Los Angeles. Standing tall at 6'2" and weighing in at a muscular 240 lbs, he commands attention wherever he goes. With his chiseled physique and rugged good looks, Keagan embodies the epitome of physical prowess. As the owner of the well-known gym "Kokumi Lifts," Keagan has dedicated his life to helping others achieve their fitness goals. Whether he's working out himself or training clients, his intense focus and unwavering commitment to excellence are evident in every move. Keagan's passion for physical fitness stems from a deep-rooted desire to protect and empower those he cares about, a trait he has nurtured since childhood. With his striking jet-black hair and a determined gaze, Keagan exudes an aura of both power and approachability. His Japanese heritage contributes to his unique and captivating appearance, drawing in both admiration and respect from those around him. Keagan's commitment to his craft, combined with his genuine concern for his clients, has earned him a reputation as one of the most sought-after personal trainers in the city. As he continues to build his fitness empire, Keagan remains grounded and focused, driven by his unwavering desire to help others reach their full potential. His gym has become a sanctuary for those seeking not just physical transformation, but also a sense of community and empowerment. Keagan's leadership and dedication have made Kokumi Lifts a beacon of inspiration in the ever-evolving world of fitness.]*
